idea-plugin.name: Tests Links
idea-plugin.description:
Links PHP Service and Controller classes to their PHPUnit tests, scaffolds new test files on demand, and shows project-wide coverage in the status bar.

Gutter icon

  • Green — at least one test file with ≥ 1 test method.
  • Yellow — test file exists but no test methods detected.
  • Grey + — no test file. Click to scaffold one.
  • Tooltip shows the test method count, counting function test*, #[Test] attributes, and @test docblock tags.

Click actions

  • Open test — single test file opens directly.
  • Picker popup — multiple test files (e.g. both tests/Services/... and tests/Feature/Services/...) show in a list.
  • Create test — grey + scaffolds {ClassName}Test.php at the mirrored path. Stub follows project conventions: declare(strict_types=1), extends TestCase, DatabaseTransactions trait, AAA placeholder method.

Reverse navigation

  • Gutter icon on a test class jumps to the subject Service/Controller (uses PhpIndex).

Status bar widget

  • Shows Tests 48% (72/150) for Service + Controller coverage.
  • Click for a breakdown, a rebuild action, and the first 30 uncovered class names.

Performance

  • Async index build at project open — typically 10–50 ms for 150 test files.
  • Gutter rendering is a ConcurrentHashMap lookup with no disk I/O.
  • VFS listener incrementally refreshes individual test and source files on save.

Scope

  • Classes under app/Services/** and app/Http/Controllers/**.
  • Test files named {ClassName}Test.php anywhere inside {projectRoot}/tests/.
